name: clone-capture
description: Deterministic live-URL section capture for the /clone url-mode skill.

scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npx playwright install chromium

comment: On machines WITHOUT a global @playwright/mcp install, run `npm run bootstrap` here once. Where @playwright/mcp is already installed (the kun default), clone-capture.mjs resolves Playwright from it with zero install — this dependency is the portable fallback only.
